channel.title: Ocean on Compossible
channel.description: Recent content in Ocean on Compossible

item.title: Dolphins At Dawn (Off Sandy Bay)
item.description:
Palpitating

Shiver of sea

Sparkling splinter of

Numinous ocean

Gifted personality

The Great Green

Divested of all terror

Its playfulness distilled to

Living livery of wave

I return new-born

With Dawn’s

Rose fingered bloom

To find you

Hoping you will

Humour me

(It is you who decides

whether we shall meet
